descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 450 F For Sale 2020|Guest Cabins: 4| Crew Cabins: 2|Tax Not Paid

If you are looking for a modern, comfortable, and well‑maintained cruising catamaran, this Lagoon 450 F For Sale 2020 is a solid option to consider. She is a 2020 model that has been professionally operated under the Greek flag and remains in good overall condition. With her balanced layout, reliable equipment, and practical features suited for both private use and charter activity, she offers a dependable platform for extended cruising in the Mediterranean or beyond.

Specifications

• Engines: 2 x 57 hp Yanmar (2,700 hours as of October 2025)
• Year built: 2020
• Cabins: 4 + 2
• Heads: 4
• Length overall: 13.96 m
• Beam: 7 m
• Draft: 1 m
• Fuel capacity: 1,040 L
• Water capacity: 700 L
• Generator: 10 KVA
• Air conditioning: Yes
• Watermaker: 200 L/hr
• Sails: Battened mainsail (2020), roller genoa (2020), lazy bag
• Instruments: BMS, Raymarine, autopilot, echo sounder, wind instrument, GPS, plotter
• Refrigeration: 2 electric fridges, electric freezer
• Galley: Oven, sink, hob
• Comfort: Bimini, deck shower
• Entertainment: Radio, MP3 player, cockpit speakers, TV
• Additional: Dinghy and outboard, fixed gangway
• Location: Athens
• VAT status: Not paid
• Flag: Greek
• Professional operation

In summary, this Lagoon 450 F For Sale 2020 represents a well‑kept and thoughtfully equipped catamaran that is ready for continued use, whether for private cruising or professional operation. Her condition, practical layout, and reliable systems make her a dependable option for anyone seeking a comfortable and capable boat already based in the Mediterranean. With her location in Athens and her comprehensive list of equipment, she offers a straightforward and appealing opportunity for her next owner. contact us Now !!
